data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for opt-in/opt-out management.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate the implementation of opt-in/opt-out management. While the linked use case mentions this feature, there are no specific details or examples that confirm its functionality within the system. Therefore, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms for managing opt-in/opt-out functionality.
